input.background: Exercise 6.1 and 6.3 considered the random number of TaySachs cases in three pregnancies from a carrier couple $(X \sim b(3,0.25))$.
input.question: What is the variance of this random variable?

X.description: The random number of Tay-Sachs cases in three pregnancies from a carrier couple, following a binomial distribution with parameters n=3 and p=0.25.

n.description: The number of trials or pregnancies in the binomial distribution.

p.description: The probability of success (having a Tay-Sachs case) in each trial or pregnancy.
